title: WABACRAFT
description:
This modpack is social & content focused and based on our minecraft server adding features to enhance the interactions between players.
And adding so much content to keep players engaged and always working!
body:
![WABACRAFT TITLE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2daa2139a132e7d17afc880e101a753e0c416ab.png)

WABACRAFT is a public modpack developed by the streamer duo Rhim and Maru, [Rhimaru](https://www.twitch.tv/rhimarru)! This is the public upload to allow our community to easily get updates. If you want to play with us, come join our Discord and gain access through Ko-Fi!


- 277+ total mods!

- Mods to help new players catch up to their peers in terms of progression, by adding [Lootr](https://modrinth.com/mod/lootr/versions) and the Enchanting Infuser.

- [CREATE](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and add-ons, for those who can't live without automation. Ranging from automatic XP with [Enchantment Industry](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-enchantment-industry), and [Numismatics](https://modrinth.com/mod/numismatics) as a player driven currency.

- Mods that Improve storage via [Sophisticated Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks) for exploring, [Tom's Simple Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage) for organizing, and nerfed [Storage Drawers](https://modrinth.com/mod/storagedrawers) capacity for storing in bulk.

- [Atlas](https://modrinth.com/mod/map-atlases) and [Antique Atlas](https://modrinth.com/mod/antique-atlas-4) for more vanilla-like mapping experience.

- No Waystones, instead have a more interactable way to travel via Create's trains, [Immersive Aircraft's planes](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft), and [Aleki's Nifty Ships](https://modrinth.com/mod/alekiships) for the seas!

- Magic Mods with varying levels of Complexity, ranging from pre-built spells of [Iron's Spellbooks](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks), to spells you can customize of [Ars Nouveau](https://modrinth.com/mod/ars-nouveau), to coding what the spell does of [Hex Casting](https://modrinth.com/mod/hex-casting)!

- Improved world generation via [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith), and [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic), for those high hills and low valleys, as well as [Better Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether) and [Better End](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend) to spice up those desolate worlds and [Alex Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves/versions) to add a real challenge to down below.

- New dungeons to discover with [Call of Yucatán](https://modrinth.com/mod/call-of-yucutan) and [L_Enders Cataclysm](https://modrinth.com/mod/l_enders-cataclysm), as well as overhauled structures using [YUNG's Better structures](https://modrinth.com/user/YUNGNICKYOUNG)!

- New dimensions, from the forgotten depths of [The Undergarden](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-undergarden) to the unknown deeps of [the Abyss II](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-abyss-chapter-ii).

- Optimized shader Support, for those want to have beautiful days and spooky nights without your PC spontaneously combusting.

- [Relics](https://modrinth.com/mod/relics-mod) for those who love Terraria's accessory system.

- Overhauled combat with [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat), and new tools for it with MC Dungeons [Weapons](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcdw) & [Armor](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcda).

- New bosses via Cataclysm and [Mowzie's Mobs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mowzies-mobs), to challenge yourself with the new gear you have attained.

WABACRAFT is a combination of:

By AmongstReality.

### Recolorful Containers GUI + HUD https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/recolourful-containers-gui
By Vi_Tul.

### Mandala's GUI - Dark mode https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mandalas-gui-dark-mode
By CesarZorak.

### Fresh Compats - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-compats-emf
By Ithan

WABACRAFT ADDON Detailed Animations Reworked is a combination of:
### Detailed Animations https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/detailed-animations
By Cymock & MapleTape.

### The eyes from Fresh Moves  https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player
By TrasTick and IthanMendoza.
